title: CompoundingReport
description: Periodic D_c (compounding dimension) report produced at the end of each Driver cycle COMPOUND phase. Tracks superlinear vs linear vs sublinear governance value growth.

cycle_id.description: Driver cycle that produced this report

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the report was generated

dc_score.description: Compounding dimension: log(value_n+1) / log(value_n). Null if value_n < threshold for meaningful computation.

dc_zone.description: Classified zone based on D_c value

value_components.description: The four ERGOL components used to compute composite value

pdca_n.description: PDCA cycles completed (reached Act phase) in current cycle

u_to_t_n.description: Belief transitions from Unknown to True in current cycle

transfers_n.description: Knowledge transfers (Seldon teaching sessions with passing assessment) in current cycle

composite_value_n.description: Weighted composite value for current cycle

pdca_prev.description: PDCA cycles completed in previous cycle

u_to_t_prev.description: Belief U→T transitions in previous cycle

composite_value_prev.description: Weighted composite value for previous cycle

weights_used.description: Weights applied during composite value computation

trend.description: D_c trend over the last 3 cycles

cycles_analyzed.description: Number of cycles used for trend computation (need >= 3 for signal)

slope.description: Linear regression slope of D_c over trend window. Null if insufficient data.

recent_scores.description: D_c scores for the last N cycles in chronological order

learning_momentum.description: Conservation of learning momentum: p_L = (beliefs_T_gained - beliefs_T_lost) / cycles_elapsed

status.description: Whether symmetry is preserved (stable or growing) or broken (declining)

beliefs_t_lost.description: Beliefs that were demoted from T to F or U

power_law.description: Citation distribution check for healthy power law vs fragility

status.description: healthy = top 20% accounts for 60–90% of citations; fragile = top 5% > 90%

top_20_pct_share.description: Fraction of total citations attributed to top 20% of artifacts

top_5_pct_share.description: Fraction of total citations attributed to top 5% of artifacts (fragility signal)

lolli_ergol.description: Inflation check: LOLLI (artifact count growth) vs ERGOL (citation/value growth)

inflation_warning.description: True if ratio exceeds lolli_ergol_ratio threshold for 3+ cycles

action.description: Recommended action based on D_c zone and trend
examples: add /demerzel compound to next cycle PLAN
conscience signal; driver PLAN must include compounding review
immediate conscience escalation; trigger /demerzel metafix; human notification

conscience_signal_id.description: ID of conscience signal filed if action required escalation. Null if no signal filed.

notes.description: Optional freeform notes about this cycle's compounding behavior
